products.name: ScanEagle
products.descriptor: Long-endurance fixed-wing UAS with 18-hour endurance and 17 lb payload capacity

evidence.snippet:
ScanEagle
ScanEagle
The UAS that invented the agile ISR category
============================================
**Offering VTOL, SATCOM, and advancing resilience capabilities**
With over 1.6 million combat flight hours, ScanEagle is the industry’s most trusted long-endurance UAS. Electronic resilience features, SATCOM, VTOL, AI-enabled payloads, and the same best-in class endurance make today’s updated ScanEagle ready for the battlespace of tomorrow.

products.name: Integrator
products.descriptor: Modular multi-mission fixed-wing UAS with 27.5-hour endurance and 50 lb payload capacity

evidence.snippet:
Integrator
Integrator
One aircraft, infinite possibilities
====================================
The Integrator is the most versatile UAS in its class, with a modular design to fit every mission. Endless configuration options include no-sacrifice VTOL and extended-range SATCOM capabilities.

products.name: RQ-21A Blackjack
products.descriptor: USN/USMC program-of-record small tactical UAS for land and maritime operations

evidence.snippet:
RQ-21A
RQ-21A
Program of Record for the U.S. Navy and U.S. Marine Corps
=========================================================
Expeditionary, payload flexible and the most versatile UAS in its class.
###### Modularity
Supports wide range of missions including electronic warfare, ISR, and communications relay
###### Flexibility
Runway-independent design easily operates from land or at sea
###### Persistence

### Program Status
**17,000+** – flight hours
**14** – deployments completed
**8** – maritime MEU deployments
**6** – land-based deployments
**31** – systems delivered to USN and USMC
**4** – international customers via NAVAIR FMS program

products.name: Common Ground Control Station (cGCS)
products.descriptor: Small expeditionary ground control station for multi-UAS command and control

evidence.snippet:
cGCS
Common Ground Control Station
cGCS
Common Ground Control Station
Small Tactical Ground Control Station
=====================================
**Command and control multiple uncrewed systems from a single, small, expeditionary workstation.**

products.name: FLARES VTOL Kit
products.descriptor: Autonomous vertical-takeoff-and-landing kit enabling runway-independent launch and recovery for ScanEagle and Integrator

evidence.snippet:
###### Small Footprint
Available with traditional rail launcher/Skyhook LRE and FLARES Vertical Take-off and Landing kit, which requires minimal deck space, can launch in high seas and gusty winds, and requires zero aircraft modifications.

products.name: Dual Imager
products.descriptor: Combined EO and MWIR dual-channel day/night ISR turret for ScanEagle UAS

evidence.snippet:
Dual Imager
Dual Imager
Persistent and superior imagery day and night with a single turret
==================================================================
Combines an EO imager with an MWIR thermal camera in one turret to capture real-time daytime and nighttime intelligence without interrupting the mission
###### One turret, combined capabilities
Electro-optical (EO) and Mid-wave infrared (MWIR) imager

products.name: WAMI
products.descriptor: Wide-area motion imagery payload family (RedKite EO and BlackKite MWIR) for Integrator UAS

evidence.snippet:
WAMI
WAMI
Wide-Area Motion Imagery (WAMI) for Integrator
==============================================
RedKite® Block II is a small electro-optical system capable of monitoring a city-sized area in real time.
BlackKite® takes your city-wide search from day to night using Mid-Wave Infrared (MWIR).
